ba8d77a2-9b69-46cf-992a-5a4cd963e80a.name: Lower Gates of the Keep
ba8d77a2-9b69-46cf-992a-5a4cd963e80a.description: On the western side of the fortress, the wall which looms up from the track to the battlemented area has two large, tower-like buttresses.As you round the first of these, you find an impressive gateway occupying most of the width of the wall between them.
ba8d77a2-9b69-46cf-992a-5a4cd963e80a.notes: Adventurers can enter through the lower gates undetected.

features.name: Coat of Arms
features.description: Above the archway, a smooth, shield-shaped panel of stone bears the faded remains of a coat of arms.

exits.label: Southern Gateway
exits.description: The gateway consists of a round-topped arch and has a pair of stone doors with brass handles.

b20a22a5-7ce4-4a29-8780-581e520036c1.name: The Gateway of Berghof
b20a22a5-7ce4-4a29-8780-581e520036c1.description:
This is a large and impressive room. The walls and ceiling are of a deep red, lustrous stone, flecked with glittering white inclusions. The floor is of a smooth, pale grey stone and has a large coat of arms inlaid in its centre.
In an alcove in each corner of the room stands a large stone chair. Three of the chairs are occupied by strange, silent, unmoving figures which appear to be no more than suits of human-sized clothing, arranged as if worn by invisible, seated men. The chair in the south-eastern alcove is empty.

features.name: Large stone chairs
features.description: Positioned in each corner of the room

exits.label: Southern Gateway
exits.description: The gateway leads back to the lower gates of the keep.

exits.label: Northern gateway
exits.description: Identical in appearance to the southern gateway, leads north.

exits.label: Eastern gateway
exits.description: Identical in appearance to the southern gateway, leads east.

fc3aa404-6727-48c5-9a2b-8cc4ac44fe45.name: Toll Room
fc3aa404-6727-48c5-9a2b-8cc4ac44fe45.description: This is a small, plain room. Projecting from the left-hand wall is a long, stone table with a pan-balance mounted on it near the right-hand end. Behind the table are a pair of chairs and a large iron-bound chest against the far wall.

features.name: Table with pan-balance
features.description: The pan balance and its weights appears to be brass

features.name: Iron-bound Chest
features.description: Three locks are fastened on the chest

exits.label: Eastern gateway
exits.description: Eastern gateway leading back to The Gateway of Berghof

e2e53dbb-80b8-435f-a255-6789265bc059.name: Guardian's Hall
e2e53dbb-80b8-435f-a255-6789265bc059.description:
This long hall appears to beempty but you cannot see the far end since it is obscured by an uneven screen of a paper-like material. The floor consists of green, red
and white hexagonal tiles, each about 6 inches across, laid out in a regular pattern. The walls are pale grey and plain, as is the ceiling.

exits.label: Northern gateway
exits.description: Back to the Gateway of Berghof

exits.label: Paper-like screen
exits.description: A partition of unclear substance and origin

caba1f5f-8876-446c-80c0-cfba1db259a2.name: Guardian's Hall (b)
caba1f5f-8876-446c-80c0-cfba1db259a2.description:
Beyond the screen you find another section of the room but the far end is still obscured since there is a second screen. This is similar to the first except that
there is a small hole in it near the floor.
There are five giant ants working here

features.name: Pile of rubbish
features.description: The floor everywhere is covered in rubbish except near the centre of the room

features.name: Bundles
features.description: Five irregular bundles bound with silk threads suspended from the ceiling: various dead animals

features.name: Hole
features.description: About one foot across, surrounded by the pile of rubbish on all sides

exits.label: Paper-like screen (S)
exits.description: Uneven screen of unknown substance and origin

exits.label: Paper-like screen (n)
exits.description: Uneven screen of unknown substance and origin

825c1784-525a-4a97-b2b3-df3225357161.name: Guardian's Hall (c)
825c1784-525a-4a97-b2b3-df3225357161.description: This is the final section of the room. The far wall bears a vivid mosaic. Lying on an altar-like table below this is the bloated mass of a queen ant.

features.name: Mosaic
features.description: Depicts a large glove of pale leather with a blue stone ring on the index finger.

features.name: Alter-like table
features.description: Appears to have some sort of buttons or knobs inlaid

exits.label: Paper-like screen (s)
exits.description: Uneven screen of unknown material and origin

exits.label: Wooden door (e)
exits.description: Standard wooden door with iron handle

301fe2b0-d37f-4495-8fdf-1242823c9552.name: Painted room
301fe2b0-d37f-4495-8fdf-1242823c9552.description: This octagonal room has a slender, stone pillar near the wall at each corner. The ceiling is painted to represent a domed roof, supported by these pillars, and the walls show a country scene which continues all the way around the room. With a little imagination, you could be standing in a summer house, surrounded by pleasant pastures and woodlands, at the top of a grassy slope leading down to a large lake.
